props.description: Brand: { prefix?, name, href? } or free-form node

props.name: nav
props.description: Top nav: links or dropdown menus ({ label, items })

props.name: actions
props.description: Right-aligned global icon actions with aria-pressed

props.name: end
props.description: Free-form trailing slot (user menu, theme switcher)

props.name: onMenuClick
props.description: Renders the hamburger button; call shell.toggleSideNav

props.name: skipToContentHref
props.description: Skip-link target; false disables the link

items.name: side-nav
items.description: Collapsible sidebar navigation with optional icons and one level of grouping

meta.name: SideNav
meta.description: Collapsible sidebar navigation with optional icons and one level of grouping

props.name: items
props.description: { label, href?, icon?, active?, items? } — items with nested items render as expandable groups

props.name: expandOnHover
props.description: Widens the rail as an overlay on hover/focus-within; suppresses tooltips/flyouts

props.name: footer
props.description: Content rendered above the collapse toggle (e.g. version string, user info)

items.name: skeleton
items.description: Animated loading placeholder that mirrors the shape of pending content

meta.name: Skeleton
meta.description: Animated loading placeholder that mirrors the shape of pending content

props.name: width
props.description: CSS length applied as an inline custom property

props.name: height
props.description: CSS length applied as an inline custom property

props.name: lines
props.description: Number of bars for the text variant; the last bar renders shorter

items.name: skip-nav
items.description: Skip link that jumps keyboard users past the navigation to the main content

meta.name: SkipNav
meta.description: Skip link that jumps keyboard users past the navigation to the main content

props.name: targetId
props.description: SkipNavLink: id of the SkipNavTarget to jump to

props.name: labels
props.description: SkipNavLink: overrides the built-in i18n label per instance

props.name: id
props.description: SkipNavTarget: anchor id — must match the link targetId

items.name: slider
items.description: Range input for selecting a value within bounds

meta.description: Range input for selecting a value within bounds

items.name: spinner
items.description: Indeterminate loading indicator

meta.name: Spinner
meta.description: Indeterminate loading indicator

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label announced by screen readers

items.name: stat
items.description: Displays a key metric with optional delta, trend direction and help text

meta.name: Stat
meta.description: Displays a key metric with optional delta, trend direction and help text

props.name: delta
props.description: Change indicator rendered next to the trend arrow

props.name: helpText
props.description: Fine print below the value (methodology, time range)

items.name: status
items.description: Colored dot with a label communicating the state of a system or entity

meta.name: Status
meta.description: Colored dot with a label communicating the state of a system or entity

props.name: pulse
props.description: Pulses the dot — gated behind prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference

items.name: switcher
items.description: App/product switcher list — lives inside HeaderPanel, renders links with active indicator and optional dividers

meta.description: App/product switcher list — lives inside HeaderPanel, renders links with active indicator and optional dividers

props.name: items
props.description: SwitcherLink ({ label, href, active?, icon? }) or divider ({ divider: true })

items.name: tabs
items.description: Switch between related panels of content

meta.description: Switch between related panels of content

props.description: When provided, renders a trailing remove button inside the chip
